embeds.title: Vaulting ((N!)  +792)
embeds.description: Created page with "\{\{stub\}\} \{\{aetitle\|Vaulting\|v a u l t i n g\}\} \{\{hr\}\} \<center\> '''Vaulting''' is a mechanic that allows one to make more distance or escape an [alter ego](<https://alter-ego.fandom.com/wiki/Alter_Egos>). Player can vault by pressing 'space' near specific spots on the maps like wooden part in the brick fence in the [SFOTH](<https://alter-ego.fandom.com/wiki/SFOTH>) or hole in the wall on the [Island Asylum](<https://alter-ego.fandom.com/wiki/Island_Asylum>) or [Satellite Office](<https://alter-ego.fandom.com/wiki/Satellite_Office>).  After vaulting, on victim applies modifier which make them unable to vault for 10 seconds \<\/center\>  == Vault Spot..."
